历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 8514 → 7648 → 6423 → 5308 → 5728, showing a clear upward trend overall, with a cumulative increase of about 3206 places from 2021 to 2024, a slight decline to 5728 in 2025, and a fluctuation of about 420 places in the last two years; the provincial science/physics enrollment plan was 122 in 2021 → 115 in 2022 → 114 in 2023 → 100 in 2024 → 105 in 2025, showing a decreasing trend; the 2026 plan is 103, a decrease of 2 from 2025, a slight reduction of about 1.9%, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science Chinese University Ranking steadily rose from 50th in 2021 to 43rd in 2025 and 43rd in 2026, with continuous improvement in ranking, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition; no significant negative public opinion appeared in the 2026 reputation evaluation data; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 27th (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, and education bloggers like Zhang Xuefeng have repeatedly recommended its flagship majors such as Underwater Acoustics Engineering and Nuclear Engineering, resulting in high application attention; Control Science and Engineering was rated A-level (fifth round of discipline evaluation), and distinctive disciplines such as Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering, Underwater Acoustics Engineering, and Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology are among the top in the country, highly aligned with the university's 'Three Seas and One Nuclear' positioning, strongly attracting candidates interested in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly popular and recommended, closely matching the university's advantageous engineering majors; in 2026, there are 167,419 physics category candidates in Shanxi Province, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competition pressure; the university is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, in the Northeast region, with a relatively large enrollment plan in Shanxi (over 100 people), and a high proportion of cross-provincial enrollment; Shanxi candidates have a good recognition of strong engineering universities in the Northeast, and regional factors do not pose significant obstacles.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the overall upward trend in historical rankings, the slight reduction in enrollment in 2026, the continuous rise in university ranking, strong appeal of advantageous disciplines, and high major popularity, the application heat is expected to steadily increase; also considering the mitigating effect of a slight decrease in the total number of physics category candidates; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5613, with a range of 5113–6113.

It is recommended that candidates with a ranking within 5113 focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Xinghai Leading class types (Nuclear Engineering, Naval Architecture, Artificial Intelligence, etc.); candidates with a ranking near 5613 should mainly target Tier 2 major enrollment categories (Automation, Computer Science, Underwater Acoustics Engineering, etc.), with a high probability of admission; candidates with a ranking near 6113 can consider Tier 3 majors as safety options (Aerospace, Ocean Engineering, Mechanical, etc.). The university's major enrollment policy allows free selection within the major category, so attention should be paid to specific分流 rules when applying.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category fluctuated significantly: approximately 2296 → 3367 → 2412 → 2354 → 2994. In 2022, due to batch mergers and other factors, the ranking noticeably dropped, then recovered in 2023–2024, but dropped again to 2994 in 2025, showing an overall volatile trend. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan: 7 in 2021 → 13 in 2022 → 15 in 2023 → 29 in 2024 → 25 in 2025. After recent expansion, it has stabilized. The 2026 plan is 25, unchanged from 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; Soft Science ranking continuously rising (50th in 2021 → 43rd in 2026), overall strength steadily increasing. No significant negative public opinion on reputation; Douyin popularity ranking 27th (relatively hot), the 'Seven Sons of National Defense' label boosts overall attention, indirectly driving applications for liberal arts majors. The university is engineering-oriented, with liberal arts majors (Law, Sociology, English, Business Administration) not entering A-level discipline evaluations, but relying on the overall 211 platform, these majors still have certain competitiveness.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is relatively hot (recommended), English/foreign languages are generally wait-and-see, Business Administration/management is clearly discouraged. In 2026, Shanxi Province has 63,113 history category examinees, a sharp decrease of about 25.6% from 84,879 in 2025, significantly easing competition pressure. The university is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang, with a moderate enrollment scale for liberal arts in Shanxi (25). Northeastern universities have average appeal to Shanxi liberal arts examinees, with no obvious regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the volatile historical rankings, unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, rising university ranking, and a sharp 25.6% decrease in history category examinees, the significant drop in total examinees is the most critical factor affecting rankings. Eased competition will push rankings noticeably lower. Predicted minimum ranking: approximately 3144, with a range of 2644–3644.
